microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard across enterprise workloads.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring zero-tolerance recovery SLAs.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to **reduce planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, translating technical pain points into prioritized feature requirements for the engineering backlog.

Improved data integrity and accelerated retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search platform**, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework adopted across 140+ service teams.

Conducted pre-sales-style discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil per region**, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths — directly informing executive investment decisions.

Enabled leadership to target **automation gaps** and prioritize high-impact investments by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, providing real-time visibility into region launch health.

Facilitated stakeholder alignment across engineering, operations, and product groups to define solution requirements, scope delivery timelines, and coordinate resources — mirroring enterprise pre-sales execution at scale.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional delivery across IT and engineering.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and accelerate time-to-resolution across the robotics software team.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention in production rollouts.

Translated complex operational requirements into executable technical plans, coordinating specialist resources and communicating deployment timelines to senior stakeholders — demonstrating the consultative pre-sales rigor required for enterprise solution delivery.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing the end-to-end sales operations lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that improved pipeline visibility, scoping accuracy, and invoicing turnaround.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to capture high-intent inbound leads.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a TCO-style model that directly influenced territory sales strategy.
